name: ardhi-mcp
description: MCP server for Kenya land administration — title search, land rates, subdivision process, land disputes, and National Land Commission guidance. 5 tools.

tools.name: title_search_guide
tools.description: Guide to searching land titles at Kenya Land Registry. Returns process steps, costs, and required documents.

tools.name: land_rates_query
tools.description: Query land rates and rent for Kenya counties. Returns rate calculation basis and payment channels.

tools.name: subdivision_process
tools.description: Step-by-step subdivision application process for Kenya land parcels.

tools.name: land_dispute_paths
tools.description: Dispute resolution pathways for Kenya land: NLC, ELC, traditional mediation. Returns eligibility and steps.

tools.name: land_rights_query
tools.description: Query land rights under Kenya Constitution 2010 and Land Act 2012.
